name: JWT Decoder
description: Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens with complete data sovereignty. No external transmission. Intelligent timestamp parsing (exp/iat/nbf → human-readable), automatic security analysis (alg:none alerts, expiry checks), and signature display. 100% LOCAL.
tool_spotlight_template:
Decode JWTs Without Exposing Secrets

Stop pasting your tokens into online decoders that log your payload. Use our fully client-side JWT decoder to inspect headers and payloads without sending data to any server.

Open JWT Decoder →
